title: Research: fiber/channel runtime models for later execution bands
body:
## What was done

Updated **Plan.md** with concurrency models: preemptible fibers, pointer channels, and syscall-pool guards—implementation explicitly out of v0.0 scope.

## Why it mattered

Captured design intent before Beskid execution bands so later work would not rediscover requirements from scratch.

## Research conclusion

**Document only in v0.0**; shipping fiber/channel runtime deferred to **v0.2+** execution planning.
